docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY GALITSKY, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT ALLVOICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GALITSKY, BORIS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALITSKY, BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT ALLVOICES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALITSKY, BORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLVOICES, INC. $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,862.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLVOICES, INC.
